placements.label: Approved Overworld with real grass and parking beneath walk-behind building rows
placements.notes: Current approved map base. The upper four rows of each building use real ground pixels copied from this map; opaque foreground placements reconstruct the original artwork until Lulu enters an occlusion zone.

placements.label: Apartment North Upper walk-behind foreground
placements.notes: Original approved apartment_building pixels. Opaque normally; fades to 42% opacity only while Lulu's feet are inside this four-row walk-behind zone. Ground below is grass.
